raw_consumer_statement: I would like to say to anyone that looks to open a Home Depot credit line account please understand that they do not protect you in the case of stolen and fraudulent activity. Instead they try everything that they can to accuse you of fraudulent activity. Fraudulent activity occurred on my credit card XXXX. I reported the card as stolen. The case was initially denied. I was told it was because I was unable to be reached and that a LOLLIPOP WAS PURCHASED ( FRAUDULENT ) that matched a LOLLIPOP THAT WAS PURCHASED 3 years prior. Basically the conclusion that I made those purchases was based on a lollipop! I called several times and faxed over proof to them that I was not in town several times but each time they stated they did not receive the faxes and emails. Yet I have confirmation that the faxes and emails were received. Finally after filing a complaint with XXXX ( after almost a year of them denying they received my proof ), XXXX reached out to me to ask me to resubmit my proof. I sent over police report & information stating I was on a XXXX travel assignment out of town during that time. She then emails me back and says that she needs a specific timeline of the dates that I was out of town on. I submitted that XX/XX/year> along with license showing that the signature on the receipt did not come remotely close to matching my signature. EVEN AFTER THAT I RECEIVED AN EMAIL TODAY SAYING THAT THEY DENIED REOPENING MY CASE. EVERYONE PLEASE LEARN A VALUABLE LESSON FROM ME DO NOT AND I MEAN DO NOT OPEN A LINE OF CREDIT WITH HOME DEPOT. THEY WILL NOT SUPPORT YOU IN A CRISIS SITUATION AND INTURN ATTEMPT TO ACCUSE YOU OF COMMITING FRAUD INSTEAD. I WILL NEVER SHOP WITH THEM AGAIN.. side note a month ago I was in a Home Depot XXXX my XXXX XXXX daughter fell and hit her head on their concrete floor while in the paint section. NO ONE and I mean NO ONE bothered to come and check on us. Not even the paint sales associate standing XXXX away. STEER CLEAR OF HOME DEPOT XXXX XXXX XXXX!
